channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish building up on the road and pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Rubbish build up on the road and pavement this as been reported on several occasions can a clean of this road be done a road sweeper is unable to get in between cars so will need someone to sweep and pick thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 x vehicles been dumped, 21st June
item.description:
3 x cars and vans been dumped and kids are smashing the windows been here for a few months now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meaford Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on the pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Rubbish as been fly tipped on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Outside house numbers 39 and 41, 21st June
item.description:
Sadly this tree is dead

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Summerfield Avenue, London

item.title: Large amount of waste been dumped, 21st June
item.description:
Large amounts of rubbish been dumped on the road wood etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meaford Way, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Suspected builder's waste dump on pavement in St. Merryn Close, Plumstead SE18 2RF.., 21st June
item.description:
I am very anxious about bags (possibly builders waste - hazardous ?) dumped on pavement in St Merryn Close, SE18 2RF (near to No. 1). Believe dumped sometime overnight Saturday 20th June 2026. Discovered approximately 6.15 am Sunday 21st June 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Merryn Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of domestic waste, 21st June
item.description:
Someone has left 3-4. Bags of food waste and it has been pulled open by crows and strewn about the street. In this hot weather it will become even more disgusting and attract vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please empty and take away detrtitus, 21st June
item.description:
Another bin to be emptied on Alexis St green Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please ask street cleaners to stop leaving bags here?, 21st June
item.description:
Every other day this occurs, I clear it up, but if bags are not removed it happends again Bags are left here for days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bus shelter in High St Beckenham southbound Lane - illuminated display panel detached and leaning out about 75mm at the top., 21st June
item.description:
Bus shelter in High St Beckenham southbound Lane - illuminated display panel detached and leaning out about 75mm at the top. Still illuminated and wires not obvious, but it needs fairly prompt repair. Seen about 11.30pm Sat 20/6/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly I’m tipping, 21st June
item.description:
Between Holbeach road and nelgarde road next to the flats is bedmates tables cubicle been there from Wednesday people are trying to set it a light I was walking pass that way on 20/6/2026 it needs to be removed soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop K, northbound, fronting Sainsbury's, High St, Penge - missing timetables for routes 194, 227 and 358., 21st June
item.description:
Bus stop K, northbound, fronting Sainsbury's, High St, Penge - missing timetables for routes 194, 227 and 358. The N3 timetable is present

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
